name: Cayenne Buttermilk Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the sour cream, buttermilk, garlic, onion, lime juice, and cayenne.
2. Add salt and pepper to taste. Mix well until all ingredients are thoroughly incorporated.
3. The dressing may be prepared up to 1 day in advance and stored refrigerated.
4. Makes 1/2 cup.
